name: Adam Something
analysis_notes: Sonnet 4.5 analysis from transcript. Strong research with multiple city examples across regions (Egypt, UAE, Saudi Arabia, China, Russia, Turkmenistan). Original thesis connecting autocratic urban design to social control and protest prevention. High signal/noise ratio with minimal padding. Educational content on urban planning and authoritarianism with lasting value. Loses 1 point on research_depth for being more analytical than deeply sourced (no cited studies/experts), but compensates with breadth of examples.
